factions.name: Solari Dominion
factions.description: Golden, elegant civilization specializing in armor tanking and energy weapons. Controls the core systems.

factions.name: Veyren Collective
factions.description: Angular, utilitarian engineers specializing in shield tanking and hybrid turrets.

factions.name: Aurelian Enclave
factions.description: Sleek, organic designers known for speed, drones, and electronic warfare.

factions.name: Keldari Union
factions.description: Rugged industrial warriors specializing in missiles, shields, and ECM.

factions.name: Void Syndicate
factions.description: Ruthless pirate organization operating in low and null security space.
